name: kdeutils
description:
This metapackage includes general-purpose utilities  provided with the official release of KDE:
 
 - ark
 - filelight
 - francis
 - isoimagewriter
 - kalm
 - kate
 - kbackup
 - kcalc
 - kcharselect
 - kclock
 - kdebugsettings
 - kdf
 - kdialog
 - keditbookmarks
 - keysmith
 - kfind
 - kgpg
 - kongress
 - krecorder
 - kteatime
 - ktimer
 - ktrip
 - kweather
 - kwrite
 - skanpage
 - sweeper
 - telly-skout
